title: scleranthus peruvianus
intro: Scleranthus peruvianus, also known as Peruvian Knawel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural diuretic, help reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Scleranthus peruvianus include its potential to support kidney and urinary tract health, while also providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Scleranthus peruvianus can be found in the form of tea, capsules, and tinctures, and are typically used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
